text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm working in my office...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... I guess I do want a change.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Bro! Can we skip the next race?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis! Can we skip the next race?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Pics of me racing are nice and all, but I wanna
upload other things to Umastagram too. Like,
say...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Pics of us out on a date! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Pics of us out on a date! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think? I wanna brag about you to
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think? I wanna brag about you to
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umastagram pictures aside, I guess she has been
pretty busy lately. Maybe we should revise her
schedule.
